scripts.dev:infra: docker compose --project-directory . -f deployment/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait && npm run seed
scripts.dev: npm run dev:infra && concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent -c blue,cyan,green "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:infra && concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent,mcp -c blue,cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:mcp"
scripts.dev:agent: cd apps/agent && PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" uv run langgraph dev --port 8133
scripts.install:agent: cd apps/agent && PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" sh -c 'if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv sync; else echo "uv not found; skipping Python agent sync. Install uv and run npm run install:agent before using the live agent."; fi'
